title: Verilator internal error when --trace is enabled

features.name: dynamic array indexing with arithmetic expression in always_comb
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with an unpacked array indexed by a dynamic arithmetic expression involving slice offsets

features.name: variable slice assignment from logic vector in procedural block
features.description: Code should include a procedural assignment using variable slice access (offset +: width) on a packed logic vector
